name: Complement Cascade
description: Complement activation: classical, lectin, and alternative pathways converge on C3 convertase, driving opsonization, anaphylatoxin release, and assembly of the C5b-C9 membrane attack complex that lyses pathogens.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Pathogen surface"]
    N2{"Activation pathway?"}
    N3["Classical: C1q-antibody"]
    N4["Lectin: MBL binds sugars"]
    N5["Alternative: C3 tickover"]
    N6["C3 convertase forms"]
    N7["C3 -> C3a + C3b"]
    N8["C3b opsonization"]
    N9["C5 convertase -> C5b"]
    N10["C5b-C9 membrane attack"]
    N11["Pathogen lysis"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 -->|classical| N3
    N2 -->|lectin| N4
    N2 -->|alternative| N5
    N3 --> N6
    N4 --> N6
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N7 --> N9
    N9 --> N10
    N10 --> N11

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: Alternative: C3 tickover
nodeDetails.detail: Spontaneous C3 hydrolysis amplified on microbial surfaces

nodeDetails.label: C3 -> C3a + C3b
nodeDetails.detail: C3 cleavage releases anaphylatoxin C3a and opsonin C3b

nodeDetails.label: C3b opsonization
nodeDetails.detail: C3b tags the pathogen for phagocytosis

nodeDetails.label: C5 convertase -> C5b
nodeDetails.detail: C5 cleavage yields C5a and C5b

nodeDetails.label: C5b-C9 membrane attack
nodeDetails.detail: Terminal components form the membrane attack complex

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

sources.title: Complement: a key system for immune surveillance and homeostasis
sources.authors: Ricklin, D.; Hajishengallis, G.; Yang, K.; Lambris, J. D.

sources.title: Complement System Part I - Molecular Mechanisms of Activation and Regulation
sources.authors: Merle, N. S.; Church, S. E.; Fremeaux-Bacchi, V.; Roumenina, L. T.
